entries.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes — think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, goal-driven execution — derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations.

Anthropic's official example agent skills — document processing (Word/Excel/PowerPoint/PDF), MCP server building, skill authoring, visual & web design, algorithmic art, internal comms, and the Claude API guide.
Muratcan Koylan's context- & harness-engineering skills — context fundamentals, compression, degradation, multi-agent coordination, memory systems, tool design, evaluation, and more.
Harness-native agent operating system — agents, skills, command shims, hooks, rules, and MCP conventions for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, and OpenCode.
Spec-driven development system for AI coding agents (agents, skills, commands, hooks).
Claude Code skills + a fast headless browser, installed by gstack's own ./setup.
Generate polished single-file HTML slide decks (editorial-magazine & Swiss-international styles) with WebGL backgrounds, image prompts, and social covers.
Matt Pocock's agent skills for real engineering — TDD, bug diagnosis, domain modeling, PRDs/issues, prototyping, and productivity workflows.
Steph Ango (kepano)'s agent skills for Obsidian — author & edit Markdown, Bases, and JSON Canvas, drive the Obsidian CLI, and clean web content with Defuddle.
Manus-style persistent file-based planning for coding agents — crash-proof task_plan.md/findings.md/progress.md that survive context loss and /clear, with slash commands (EN + 5 locales).
Lazy-senior-dev mode: forces the simplest solution that works (YAGNI, stdlib-first), auto-loaded every session via a SessionStart hook, plus on-demand audit/debt/gain/review skills.
K-Dense AI's library of 140+ science skills — bioinformatics, statistics, ML, data wrangling, paper search & writing, plus scientific-database access — for any agent CLI.
Leon's design-taste skills — frontend aesthetics, brutalist/minimalist/soft styles, image-to-code, redesign, brandkit, and image-gen helpers that stop AI from producing generic slop.
Design-intelligence skills for building professional UI/UX across platforms — a BM25-searchable design knowledge base plus banner/brand/slides/design-system skills.
Vercel's official agent skills — Next.js/React best practices, composition patterns, view transitions, React Native, deploy-to-Vercel, web design & writing guidelines.
A collection of 150+ specialized subagents — core dev, language specialists, infra, quality/security, data/AI, DX, domains, business/product, orchestration, and research.
